## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint` from `app/` or `pro/` as applicable
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` from `pro/` when touching RevAssist Pro
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run eval` when touching prompts, deal logic, schemas, or eval fixtures
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run smoke` when touching UI, routing, auth, streaming, or persistence

## Release Notes

- [ ] Docs, changelog, or release notes updated when behavior changes
- [ ] No secrets, real customer data, or provider tokens added
